injuries.comment: The Blues announced Monday (Dec. 1) that Toropchenko is considered week-to-week after sustaining scalding burns to his legs in a home accident.
Suter will be sidelined versus the Ducks on Monday (Dec. 1), as per Matthew DeFranks of the St. Louis Post-Dispatch reports.
Mrazek won't be in the lineup for Monday's (Dec. 1) road game against St. Louis, as per Lou Korac of NHL.com.
